title: Hyderabad, Telangana — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hyderabad, Telangana: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hyderabad is a city in Telangana with a population of 9,480,000. A historic city known for its pearl and diamond trading, now a major IT and pharmaceutical hub with iconic Charminar monument.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
